weekday_event_count: How many event chips are shown in the {weekday_label} column headed "{weekday_header_label}"?
Count all event chips under the "{weekday_header_label}" weekday header for {weekday_label}.
Across the month, how many event chips appear in the {weekday_label} column headed "{weekday_header_label}"?
In the calendar grid, how many event chips are listed under the "{weekday_header_label}" header?
Looking down the "{weekday_header_label}" column for {weekday_label}, how many event chips are present?
category_slot_day_count: How many dates have "{category_label}" in the "{slot_label}" slot?
Count the dates whose "{slot_label}" slot shows "{category_label}".
In the "{slot_label}" event slot, how many dates show the category label "{category_label}"?
How many date cells contain "{category_label}" in their "{slot_label}" slot?
Count every date where the "{slot_label}" slot is labeled "{category_label}".
date_filled_slot_count: How many event slots on date {date_number} contain an event chip?
Count the filled event slots on date {date_number}.
On date {date_number}, how many of the Top, Mid, and Bottom slots contain event chips?
For date {date_number}, count the event slots that are filled.
Find date {date_number}. How many event chips are shown in its slots?
date_for_category_slot_label: Which date has "{category_label}" in the "{slot_label}" slot?
Find the date whose "{slot_label}" slot shows "{category_label}". What date number is it?
What date number contains "{category_label}" in the "{slot_label}" event slot?
Identify the date where the "{slot_label}" slot is labeled "{category_label}".
Look for "{category_label}" in the "{slot_label}" slot. Which date is it on?
busiest_date_label: Which date has the most event chips?
Find the date cell with the largest number of event chips. What date number is it?
What date number has more event chips than any other date?
Across the calendar grid, which date contains the most event chips?
Identify the busiest date by event-chip count. What date number is it?

global.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with "annotation" and "answer".
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with "answer" only.

query:weekday_event_count.object_description: one month calendar where date cells contain short category chips in Top, Mid, and Bottom event slots
query:weekday_event_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer number of event chips in the requested weekday column
query:weekday_event_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around every event chip in the requested weekday column

query:category_slot_day_count.object_description: one month calendar where date cells contain short category chips in Top, Mid, and Bottom event slots
query:category_slot_day_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer number of dates whose requested slot has the requested category label
query:category_slot_day_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around the matching event chips

query:date_filled_slot_count.object_description: one month calendar where date cells contain short category chips in Top, Mid, and Bottom event slots
query:date_filled_slot_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer number of filled event slots on the requested date
query:date_filled_slot_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around the event chips on the requested date, or [] if no slots are filled

query:date_for_category_slot_label.object_description: one month calendar where date cells contain short category chips in Top, Mid, and Bottom event slots
query:date_for_category_slot_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer date number whose requested slot contains the requested category label
query:date_for_category_slot_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0, y0, x1, y1] box around the matching event chip in image pixel coordinates

query:busiest_date_label.object_description: one month calendar where date cells contain short category chips in Top, Mid, and Bottom event slots
query:busiest_date_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer date number with the most event chips
query:busiest_date_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around every event chip on that date
